channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-13 15:35 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Space travel as common as ocean flights. Starship is making it possible. 🚀
item.description: Space travel as common as ocean flights. Starship is making it possible. 🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: ChatGPT pushing wokeness. Grok sticking to reality.
item.description: ChatGPT pushing wokeness. Grok sticking to reality.

item.title: @elonmusk: Monday: Thune called everyone flooding his office a “paid influencer ecosystem.” Tuesday: Elon poste...
item.description: Monday: Thune called everyone flooding his office a “paid influencer ecosystem.” Tuesday: Elon posted his number to 200 million people. Today: Thune hit the Senate floor calling Dems’ “Jim Crow 2.0” framing “deeply irresponsible” — an insult to those who actually lived through that era. He still won’t kill the filibuster to pass the bill he calls “commonsense.” Insults the voters. Delivers the speech. Kills the bill. Every single time.

item.title: @elonmusk: McCarthy did not go far enough and there is data to back that up.
item.description: McCarthy did not go far enough and there is data to back that up.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Senate must enact the will of the people
item.description: The Senate must enact the will of the people

item.title: @elonmusk: Sen John Thune seems absolutely determined to hand control of the House and Senate to Democrats in 2...
item.description: Sen John Thune seems absolutely determined to hand control of the House and Senate to Democrats in 2026. I really do not understand how these people think.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 JUST IN: Elon Musk says “failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of Amer...
item.description: 🚨 JUST IN: Elon Musk says “failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America” Damn right it is. You’re basically giving the GREEN LIGHT to widespread voter fraud, and intentionally destroying what’s left of election integrity. GET TO WORK, THUNE!

item.title: @elonmusk: Exactly. Legacy media is a propaganda arm of the far left.
item.description: Exactly. Legacy media is a propaganda arm of the far left.

item.title: @elonmusk: TRUMP JUST MADE IT SIMPLE: Pass the SAVE America Act or NOTHING Gets Signed “We want Voter ID., we w...
item.description: TRUMP JUST MADE IT SIMPLE: Pass the SAVE America Act or NOTHING Gets Signed “We want Voter ID., we want proof of citizenship… no men playing in women’s sports… no transgender mutilation of our children, very basic things that you wouldn’t even think we’d be talking about...” We need to secure our elections with voter ID and proof of citizenship. Accurate voting is the bedrock of our country, and we can’t achieve that with widespread mail-in ballots that open the door to "crooked elections" 🗳️

item.title: @elonmusk: SAVE ACT: Once Senators return from their long weekend Leader Thune will hold a performative vote th...
item.description: SAVE ACT: Once Senators return from their long weekend Leader Thune will hold a performative vote that he knows that won't pass. Instead of forcing Democrats to actually filibuster or change the cloture rules he's going to be able to pretend like he has actually done his job. Democrats will be able to claim (correctly) that they didn't vote against the Save America Act but instead voted against closing debate. Republicans will be able to claim they voted for the act while actually voting to close debate on the act. Both sides get to claim they did something that never happened - the act was never given an up or down vote itself. Instead the senate will have just argued about procedural nonsense. Also, this performative vote will take time, time that could have been spent restoring pay for the thousands of federal workers who haven't been paid in a month.

item.title: @elonmusk: The SAVE Act is a fork in the road moment for Western Civilization.
item.description: The SAVE Act is a fork in the road moment for Western Civilization.

item.title: @elonmusk: Create anything you can imagine with Grok Imagine✨ New tools let you choose the video size and quali...
item.description: Create anything you can imagine with Grok Imagine✨ New tools let you choose the video size and quality, add different images to a single video and seamlessly combine them, and extend the video's length.

item.title: @elonmusk: I brought this painting to life using Grok. I could play around with this for days. I'm posting my a...
item.description: I brought this painting to life using Grok. I could play around with this for days. I'm posting my ai-art and satire picture over on@TheWokeObserver, my new account, so I don't clutter your feed with Grok stuff here.

item.title: @elonmusk: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
item.description: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
